subject: RE:
body:
HAPPY CHANUKAH to you and Hoping for a really better  year.
I'm  making  dinner at our house tomorrow early  (we  are a mere 16 people) . 
 If you would like to hop a plane (you  can) , you're invited .   Shall I set 
you a seat ?
[ I'm going to try to make it special for  our  Brucie, too .  We ALL  want 
him a happy  man.]
Be warm and calm (er)  today       Marcia M.



**************************************Check out AOL's list of 2007's hottest 
products.

body_html:
HAPPY CHANUKAH to you and Hoping for a really better year.
I'm  making  dinner at our house tomorrow early  (we are a mere 16 people) .  If you would like to hop a plane (you can) , you're invited .   Shall I set you a seat ?
[ I'm going to try to make it special for  our  Brucie, too .  We ALL  want him a happy man.]
Be warm and calm (er)  today       Marcia M.
